chunks.title: Jeremiah's Initial Prophecy
chunks.reason: Contains the direct divine oracle delivered by Jeremiah in the temple court.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Trial and Defense
chunks.reason: Depicts the confrontation between Jeremiah and the priests/prophets followed by his defense before the officials.

chunks.title: Elders' Appeal Based on Micah
chunks.reason: Elders cite the precedent of Hezekiah and Micah to argue for sparing Jeremiah.

chunks.title: The Fate of Uriah
chunks.reason: Narrates the parallel story of Uriah's prophecy and execution by King Jehoiakim.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Deliverance
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter by noting Ahikam's intervention that saved Jeremiah.
